key_changes: Added acSpecId: String? field to BopCardMeta with CodingKey 'ac_spec_id'
Added three private Codable structs: AcPlan (top-level), AcPhase (phases array), AcSubtask (id/description/status)
Implemented availableTabs computed property with conditional filter: .plan visible only when meta?.acSpecId != nil && acPlan != nil
Added @State var acPlan: AcPlan? = nil to BopCardPreview
Modified tabName() to show plan progress as 'Plan (done/total)'
file_insights.patterns: Conditional tab visibility, nested Codable structs, computed property filtering

key_changes: Implemented pct_bar() with ANSI color gradients (red >=90%, amber >=70%, green <70%)
Implemented format_reset() for relative time display (e.g., 'in 2h 15m')
Implemented print_providers_table() with aligned ANSI table formatting
Implemented cmd_providers() handler with watch loop, JSON output, history append
Added error snapshot creation when provider.fetch() fails (non-fatal)
file_insights.patterns: Provider detection via trait, ANSI bar charts, polling/watch mode with tokio::time::sleep, best-effort history logging

key_changes: Wired cmd_providers() call in main match statement

patterns_discovered.name: Conditional UI Tab Visibility
patterns_discovered.description: availableTabs computed property filters CardTab.allCases based on data availability (tab == .plan requires both acSpecId and acPlan)
patterns_discovered.benefit: Clean separation of data-driven UI state

patterns_discovered.name: Non-Fatal Error Snapshots
patterns_discovered.description: When provider.fetch() fails, create a ProviderSnapshot with error: Some(...) instead of propagating error
patterns_discovered.benefit: Allows partial success display even when some providers fail

patterns_discovered.name: ANSI Color Gradients
patterns_discovered.description: pct_bar() function selects color based on threshold: red (160) >=90%, amber (172) >=70%, green (71) <70%
patterns_discovered.benefit: Visual urgency cues without custom rendering

patterns_discovered.name: Polling/Watch Mode Pattern
patterns_discovered.description: Loop with conditional break, clear screen on each iteration, tokio::time::sleep between polls
patterns_discovered.benefit: Live monitoring with minimal CPU (sleep-based, not spinning)

patterns_discovered.name: Nested Codable Hierarchy
patterns_discovered.description: AcPlan → AcPhase → AcSubtask structure mirrors Auto-Claude spec nesting
patterns_discovered.benefit: Type-safe plan structure, single decode operation

gotchas_discovered.issue: acPlan loading decoupled from acSpecId detection
gotchas_discovered.risk: Plan tab may not render if acPlan fails to load but acSpecId is set; state becomes inconsistent
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: availableTabs filter requires both conditions, but no explicit error state for failed loads

gotchas_discovered.issue: Provider fetch error handling is fire-and-forget for history append
gotchas_discovered.risk: History file missing or permission denied silently ignored; may cause data loss or inconsistent state
gotchas_discovered.location: providers/mod.rs: if let Some(hp) = history::history_path() { let _ = history::append_history(...) }
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Best-effort comment acknowledges this, but error log could be helpful

gotchas_discovered.issue: Watch mode uses hardcoded ANSI escape sequences for screen clear
gotchas_discovered.risk: \x1b[2J\x1b[H may not work in all terminals (e.g., dumb, limited), or may interfere with Zellij panes
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Consider terminal capability detection or use termios crate

gotchas_discovered.issue: Plan struct assumes all subtasks have 'status' field with known values
gotchas_discovered.risk: Malformed plan JSON (missing status, unknown enum value) will fail decode silently
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Consider status enum instead of String, or fallback parsing

gotchas_discovered.risk: Slow/hanging provider can block watch loop indefinitely

approach_outcome.summary: Subtask-4-1 fully implemented across Swift and Rust with two commits. Core features (acSpecId field, AcPlan/AcPhase/AcSubtask structs, plan tab with conditional visibility) integrated into PreviewViewController. Bonus: providers CLI command added with ANSI table rendering, watch mode, and JSON output.
commits: 15e959c auto-claude: subtask-4-1 - Add acSpecId, AcPlan structs, plan tab to Quick Look
36b097c auto-claude: subtask-4-1 - Add bop providers CLI command with ANSI table and JSON output
approach_outcome.completeness: All requested features present; plan tab rendering stub present but truncated in diff
approach_outcome.code_quality: Follows existing patterns (enum-based tabs, computed properties, Codable nesting, ANSI formatting). Minor formatting cleanup applied alongside feature work.

recommendations.recommendation: Add explicit loading state for acPlan: defer plan tab rendering until acPlan is loaded and verified non-nil
recommendations.rationale: Prevents race condition where tab is visible but data is not ready
Prevents watch loop from hanging on unresponsive provider

recommendations.recommendation: Use Swift enum for AcSubtask.status instead of String; e.g., enum Status: String { case pending, in_progress, completed }
recommendations.rationale: Compile-time safety, prevents unknown status values from causing runtime errors

recommendations.recommendation: Replace hardcoded ANSI escape sequences in watch mode with crossterm or termion crate calls
recommendations.rationale: Ensures screen clearing works reliably across terminal types and Zellij panes

recommendations.recommendation: Log history append failures (even at debug level) instead of silent error suppression
recommendations.rationale: Aids debugging of quota/usage data gaps

recommendations.recommendation: Consider caching provider snapshots between polls to reduce API calls if multiple commands access provider data
recommendations.rationale: Reduces rate-limit risk for high-frequency polling
